headline: MNST's Energy Drink Boom Continues: How Long Can Demand Stay Strong?

headline: Transformative Or Overhyped? The Impact Of Weight-Loss Drugs On European Food Demand
summary: Obesity rates have risen sharply over the past few decades: in 1975, a little over 10% of US adults were obese. Read more here.
